creator: matthias.andree@gmx.de
text:
Hi Mark,

thanks for your report.

I had forwarded your problem report to Theodore Y. Ts'o (the upstream  
package's maintainer), and asked him to look at it, because it was  
apparently an upstream issue. Ted has committed changes to his software so  
that the next e2fsprogs release would no longer fail.

Given I've fixed the immediate pain spot (the unterminated loop), I  
suggest we'll wait for the next upstream release.
If you want to see what's been committed, see  
http://git.kernel.org/?p=fs/ext2/e2fsprogs.git;a=history;f=lib/uuid;h=39b077bd6568873ed84da3197d335eff78638d5b;hb=HEAD  
for the uuid-related changes.

GNATS admins feel free to mark this PR suspended. We'll then close it  
after the next upstream e2fsprogs update.

Best regards

-- 
Matthias Andree
